truthAudit.Summary: Truth audit of Run 2 identified 10 found_full findings, 4 found_partial findings (severity misclassifications or mischaracterized vulnerability types), and 10 missed vulnerabilities. Run 2 also contained 1 false positive (Information Disclosure in Help Text) and 1 misclassified finding (Audit Event Logger framed as command injection rather than insecure temp file handling). Key overclaims include marking Critical-severity vulnerabilities as High or Medium.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Format String Vulnerability in Log Function | severity: High | evidence: printf(active_format.c_str(), user_input)
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the format string vulnerability via runtime_log_format() but misclassified severity as High instead of Critical.
Run 2 did not identify the integer overflow in factorial computation (result *= i with long long overflow).
Run 2 did not identify the use-after-free in memory-pool cleanup where stage_deferred_history_flush enqueues tasks that reference scratch memory, then cleanup() frees the pool.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Command Injection via system() in Config Loader | severity: High | evidence: system(command.c_str())
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified command injection via validator_cmd + config_file passed to system(). Severity marked High but true severity is Critical.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Buffer Overflow in evaluate_expression | severity: High | evidence: strcpy(input_buffer_, expression.c_str())
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the stack buffer overflow in evaluate_expression using strcpy without bounds checking.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Race Condition in ThreadSafeCounter | severity: Medium | evidence: old_value = value_; lock_guard; value_ = old_value + 1
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the race condition in ThreadSafeCounter with read outside lock.
Run 2 did not identify the logic bomb in authentication (EMERGENCY_OVERRIDE bypass after 5 failed attempts).
Run 2 did not identify path traversal in config loading (config_dir_ + filename without validation).

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Buffer Overflow via strcpy in Expression Parser | severity: High | evidence: strcpy(expression_buffer_, expr_str.c_str())
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified the heap buffer overflow in ExpressionParser::parse using strcpy into 256-byte buffer.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Hardcoded Admin Secret | severity: Medium | evidence: ADMIN_SECRET[] = "SC_ENT_2025_AUTH"
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified hardcoded credentials but misclassified severity as Medium instead of High.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Weak Session Token Generation | severity: Medium | evidence: uniform_int_distribution(1000, 9999)
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified weak PRNG but misclassified severity as Medium instead of High.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Unsafe localtime Usage | severity: Low | evidence: localtime(&time_t) cached_time = *local_time
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified thread-unsafe localtime usage in logging.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Command Injection in Audit Event Logger | severity: Medium | evidence: system(command.c_str())
Items.Notes: Run 2 identified the audit event logger issue but mischaracterized it as command injection rather than insecure temporary file handling (CWE-377). The TEMP/TMPDIR path construction and use of system() for file logging is the primary vulnerability.
Run 2 did not identify persistent authentication state (authenticated_, login_attempts_, session_token_ not properly cleared).
Run 2 did not identify unhandled exception in variable parsing (std::stod(tokens[3]) without try-catch).
Run 2 did not identify integer underflow in memory-pool block split (previous_size - size - SPLIT_METADATA_BYTES).
Run 2 did not identify unbounded recursion in parser (parse_expression calls parse_factor calls PAREN_OPEN which calls parse_expression).
Run 2 did not identify data race in result cache (result_cache_ accessed without cache_mutex_ in evaluate_cached, called from thread_pool_->enqueue).
Run 2 did not identify TOCTOU in config loading (std::filesystem::exists check, sleep_for, then std::ifstream open).

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: Integer Division by Zero | severity: Low | evidence: 100 / static_cast<int>(token_length)
Items.Notes: Run 2 correctly identified integer division by zero in calculate_route_score.
